name: Paga
description: Paga — Nigeria mobile money and payment platform for P2P transfers, bill payments, and merchant collections via USSD and app.

seo.title: Paga — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Paga: Paga — Nigeria mobile money and payment platform for P2P transfers, bill payments, and merchant collections via USSD and app.

when_to_use: Collecting payments via USSD for unbanked Nigerian users
P2P transfers and bill payments via Paga mobile app API
Merchant collection integration for Nigerian SMBs

pros: Broad Nigeria reach via USSD and app
Supports P2P, bills, and merchant flows
Works on feature phones via USSD
cons: Docs are thin compared to Paystack
review.verdict: Useful for reaching Nigerian mass-market users, but Paystack/Flutterwave usually win on DX.
review.best_for: Nigerian merchants needing USSD and agent-based collections beyond smartphone users
review.not_for: Developers prioritizing polished REST docs or pan-African coverage
